error_signature: No testing function found for this credential.
title: Postgres credential test connection failure
symptom: When attempting to test the connection for Postgres credentials, n8n shows 'No testing function found for this credential.' This may cause confusion as it does not indicate a true connection failure.
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n does not have a testing function implemented for this specific type of Postgres setup. This means the test button may fail even if the credentials are correct.
fix_steps: Ignore the Test Button and close the credential window.
Execute the Node directly in your workflow to check if it works.
agent_instruction: Execute the Postgres node in your workflow instead of using the test connection button.
